strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI, and automated testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, key required technologies
Lack of clear evidence of Kotlin or Java production use beyond legacy/academic projects
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 6+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — aligning with core requirements — and explicitly mentions AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, a strong differentiator. However, the resume lacks any mention of Nest.js or Vitest, both explicitly required, and while Java/Kotlin are listed in skills, no production use cases are cited. The absence of these key stack components creates significant risk despite strong overall experience.
